name: Echoing Channel
description:
Animist When you channel the powers of life and death, your apparition absorbs and enhances the spiritual energy, carrying it to a nearby ally.

Cleric When you pull forth vitality or void energy, you also create a smaller pocket of that energy.

If the next action you use is to cast a 2-action or to heal or damage a single creature, choose one additional creature in range. Target that creature with a 1-action version of the same spell. This spell is the same rank as the 2-action harm or heal you cast and doesn't cost another spell slot.
